title: 1.1: Tests that createDashboardSceneFromDashboardModel returns a DashboardScene with complete state including metadata, links, time settings, variables, and dashboard controls when given a DashboardModel with full configuration
1.2: Tests that createDashboardSceneFromDashboardModel transforms constant-type variables into ConstantVariable instances when the dashboard includes constant variables in templating

1.3: Tests that createDashboardSceneFromDashboardModel transforms adhoc-type variables into AdHocFiltersVariable instances with datasource configuration preserved when the dashboard includes adhoc variables backed by a datasource
1.2: Tests that createDashboardSceneFromDashboardModel includes cursor-sync behavior configured from the dashboard cursor/tooltip setting when that setting is enabled
1.3: Tests that createDashboardSceneFromDashboardModel attaches the live-now timer behavior during standard dashboard scene creation
1.4: Tests that createDashboardSceneFromDashboardModel initializes a variables container when templating exists but contains no variables
1.6: Tests that createDashboardSceneFromDashboardModel uses snapshot-style variable representations and preserves adhoc filters when DashboardModel is created as a snapshot
1.7: Tests that createDashboardSceneFromDashboardModel keeps panels after a collapsed row as top-level scene children rather than placing them under that collapsed row
1.8: Tests that createDashboardSceneFromDashboardModel creates scene children for panels defined inside a collapsed row, including library panels with library behavior
1.9: Tests that createDashboardSceneFromDashboardModel places panels positioned outside any row as top-level scene children in the grid layout
1.10: Tests that createDashboardSceneFromDashboardModel groups panels as children of an expanded row when their gridPos positions fall within the row's range
1.11: Tests that createDashboardSceneFromDashboardModel attaches LibraryPanelBehavior to library panels within expanded rows when the dashboard includes library panels positioned in expanded rows
1.12: Tests that createDashboardSceneFromDashboardModel creates an empty row scene child with no children when an expanded row contains no panels
2.1: Places the tests covering dashboard scene creation from DashboardModel in public/app/features/dashboard-scene/serialization/transformSaveModelToScene.test.ts
2.2: Places the test covering new-dashboard save model transformation in public/app/features/dashboard-scene/serialization/transformSaveModelToScene.test.ts
2.3: Places the tests covering row/panel organization as scene children in public/app/features/dashboard-scene/serialization/transformSaveModelToScene.test.ts
3.1: All tests use the Jest testing framework with describe blocks, it blocks, and expect assertions
3.2: All tests name each it block with a 'should ...' prefix
